projects.name: iPlan (MSU-IIT System)
projects.description: Contributed to the development of the existing iPlan system, focusing on high-fidelity dashboarding for university-level planning and resource management.

projects.name: CCS Attendance Monitoring System
projects.description: A QR-based attendance system developed to automate event monitoring for the School of Computer Studies, reducing manual tracking effort.

projects.name: eSihagBa
projects.description: An offline-first budget transparency portal for barangays on the Internet Computer Protocol, featuring a retro-modern, minimalist terminal aesthetic.

projects.name: MaxYield (LST Index)
projects.description: A DeFi protocol on Solana for yield-bearing staking tokens (LSTs), complete with a dark-mode dashboard for real-time visualization of protocol performance.

projects.name: Largo
projects.description: An app-agnostic earnings and expense tracker designed for transport drivers in the Philippines, optimized for high-intensity, mobile-first usage.
